knowledge_base.title: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School IB Authorizations
knowledge_base.description: Canonical, deduplicated knowledge base derived from four IB authorization certificates (PYP, MYP, DP, CP). All factual statements preserved from source documents; no information invented.

school_profile.name: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School
school_profile.profile_summary: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School is a multi-programme International Baccalaureate (IB) school authorized to deliver the full continuum of IB education. The school maintains current authorization for four distinct programs. Authentication features, including holograms and watermarks, are present on all source certificates.

ib_authorizations.reissue_note: This certificate does not list a separate reissue date

relationships.subject: Olli-Pekka Heinonen
relationships.object: Director General of the International Baccalaureate

retrieval_anchors.title: Comprehensive IB Status
retrieval_anchors.text: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School is a fully authorized International Baccalaureate institution. The school offers the Primary Years Programme (PYP), Middle Years Programme (MYP), Diploma Programme (DP), and Career-related Programme (CP), with certificates reissued or authorized as recently as late 2025 under the authority of Director General Olli-Pekka Heinonen.

retrieval_anchors.title: Authorization Timeline
retrieval_anchors.text: The authorization history for Vishwashanti Gurukul World School begins with the Diploma Programme in May 2006, followed by the Primary Years Programme (2009) and the Middle Years Programme (2018). In late 2025, the school achieved a new authorization for the Career-related Programme (October) and completed a reissue cycle for the DP, PYP, and MYP (November).

retrieval_anchors.title: MYP Specificity and Governance
retrieval_anchors.text: The Middle Years Programme (MYP) at Vishwashanti Gurukul World School is specifically authorized for Years 1 through 5. All school certifications are issued by the International Baccalaureate (Baccalauréat International / Bachillerato Internacional) and signed by Director General Olli-Pekka Heinonen, based in Geneva.

developer_implementation_guide: Initialize School Profile: Create a primary record for 'Vishwashanti Gurukul World School.'
Map Program Relationships: Link the four unique IB program modules (PYP, MYP, DP, CP) to the institution record.
Input Temporal Data: Store 'Original Issue Date,' 'Reissue Date,' and 'Authorization Date' as date-type objects. Treat the CP October 2025 date as the primary Authorization Date.
Security Verification: Use the 'Hologram and Watermark' requirement as a mandatory Boolean flag (has_physical_security_features: true) for document authenticity audits.

data_validation_rules.description: Ensure the MYP program is recorded with the explicit scope 'Years 1, 2, 3, 4 and 5.'
Verify that the Director General name is standardized as 'Olli-Pekka Heinonen' (mapping from the signature 'Olli-Pekha Hein').
Validate that the CP certificate date is October 2025, while DP, MYP, and PYP reissue dates are November 2025.
All program titles must be stored in full English nomenclature as defined in the source headers.
Audit for the presence of the hologram and watermark as a mandatory condition for record activation.
